title: betula alnus subsp. glutinosa
intro: Betula alnus subsp. glutinosa, also known as silver birch or European white birch, is a subspecies of the Betula alnus tree, native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Betula alnus subsp. glutinosa include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
